name: tier-b/elixir/01-umbrella-positive
description: Umbrella positive: root mix.exs declares apps_path: "apps"; immediate subdirectories of apps/ contain their own mix.exs files.

manifests.mix.exs:
defmodule MyUmbrella.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      apps_path: "apps",
      version: "0.1.0",
      start_permanent: Mix.env() == :prod,
      deps: deps()
    ]
  end

  defp deps, do: []
end
manifests.apps/foo/mix.exs:
defmodule Foo.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      app: :foo,
      version: "0.1.0",
      build_path: "../../_build",
      config_path: "../../config/config.exs",
      deps_path: "../../deps",
      lockfile: "../../mix.lock",
      elixir: "~> 1.15",
      deps: []
    ]
  end
end
manifests.apps/bar/mix.exs:
defmodule Bar.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      app: :bar,
      version: "0.1.0",
      build_path: "../../_build",
      config_path: "../../config/config.exs",
      deps_path: "../../deps",
      lockfile: "../../mix.lock",
      elixir: "~> 1.15",
      deps: []
    ]
  end
end
